violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Cabinet faces and handles throughout dirty and/or greasy.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration * . - Sanitizer for the dishwasher measured 0ppm. The sanitizer solution container that the dishwasher draws from was empty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors and walls throughout dirty or greasy.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee * did not wash hands as necessary. - Hand sink was dry when inspector went to wash hands, an indicator that employees aren't washing their hands frequently enough. - Sanitizer at handwashing station empty. - hand towels at handwashing station empty.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
